column8: On ... Friday he comes home early.
column9: On  Saturday and on Sunday he does not go to ... work.
column10: There are ... beautiful buildings in the streets.
column11: There are ... beautiful parks and gardens in the town.
column12: ... people like to go there after work.
column13: In the evening you can hear the sounds of ... music from the parks.
column14: I go to ... school in the morning, so I get up early.
column15: We have ... breakfast in the kitchen.
column16: My granny stays at home and cooks ... dinner.
column17: I have ... lunch at school after the third lesson.
column18: When we come home, we have ... dinner.
column19: Every day my husband goes to ... work.
